visual_summary: The image depicts a modern computer lab with multiple rows of desks, each equipped with desktop computers featuring blank or locked screens. There is one person seated with back facing the camera near the door. A blackboard with faint writings is mounted on the far wall.
plausible_actions: person typing or working on computer
cinematic_notes: use of wide shots to emphasize emptiness or isolation
soft lighting highlighting the single person
close-ups on computer screens or blackboard notes
tracking shots following movement through aisles

visual_summary: The image shows an urban alley view through a large window with a metal frame and an indoor window sill visible. The alley is flanked by modern office buildings with glass and concrete facades, and there is a small area with parked cars and some industrial equipment, possibly dumpsters. The scene has an overcast or rainy atmosphere, with wet ground and muted lighting.
location: Urban office building alley viewed from inside
continuity_anchors: dark glass and concrete building facades
dumpsters near the end of the alley
cinematic_notes: use natural diffused lighting for moody atmosphere
shoot through window reflections for layered shots
consider time-lapse of changing lights in office windows
frame alley leading lines for depth
